ayahs.translation: By the dawn
And [by] ten nights
And [by] the even [number] and the odd
And [by] the night when it passes

ayahs.arabic: هَلۡ فِي ذَٰلِكَ قَسَمٞ لِّذِي حِجۡرٍ
ayahs.translation: Is there [not] in [all] that an oath [sufficient] for one of perception
ayahs.transliteration: Hal fee thalika qasamun lithee hijrin

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمۡ تَرَ كَيۡفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
ayahs.translation: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with 'Aad
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka biAAadin

ayahs.translation: [With] Iram - who had lofty pillars

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّتِي لَمۡ يُخۡلَقۡ مِثۡلُهَا فِي ٱلۡبِلَٰدِ
ayahs.translation: The likes of whom had never been created in the land
ayahs.transliteration: Allatee lam yukhlaq mithluha fee albiladi

ayahs.translation: And [with] Thamud, who carved out the rocks in the valley
And [with] Pharaoh, owner of the stakes
[All of] whom oppressed within the lands
And increased therein the corruption
So your Lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment
Indeed, your Lord is in observation

ayahs.arabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبۡتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكۡرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّيٓ أَكۡرَمَنِ
ayahs.translation: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me
ayahs.transliteration: Faamma alinsanu itha ma ibtalahu rabbuhu faakramahu wanaAAAAamahu fayaqoolu rabbee akramani

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبۡتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيۡهِ رِزۡقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّيٓ أَهَٰنَنِ
ayahs.translation: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me
ayahs.transliteration: Waamma itha ma ibtalahu faqadara AAalayhi rizqahu fayaqoolu rabbee ahanani

ayahs.translation: No! But you do not honor the orphan
And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor
And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether
And you love wealth with immense love

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّآۖ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ دَكّٗا دَكّٗا
ayahs.translation: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed
ayahs.transliteration: Kalla itha dukkati alardu dakkan dakkan

ayahs.translation: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank

ayahs.arabic: وَجِاْيٓءَ يَوۡمَئِذِۭ بِجَهَنَّمَۚ يَوۡمَئِذٖ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكۡرَىٰ
ayahs.translation: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but what good to him will be the remembrance
ayahs.transliteration: Wajeea yawmaithin bijahannama yawmaithin yatathakkaru alinsanu waanna lahu alththikra

ayahs.translation: He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life
So on that Day, none will punish [as severely] as His punishment
And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers]
[To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul
Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him]
And enter among My [righteous] servants
And enter My Paradise
